# PERF-050 negative: the pattern is compiled once at package scope
lang: go
file: PERF-050-safe.go
---
package sample

import "regexp"

var headerRE = regexp.MustCompile(`^[A-Z]+$`)

func FindHits(rows []string) []bool {
	hits := make([]bool, 0, len(rows))
	for _, r := range rows {
		hits = append(hits, headerRE.MatchString(r))
	}
	return hits
}
